description_long: This object is a large, antique-style cannon mounted on a wooden carriage with four wheels. The cannon barrel is long, cylindrical, and appears to be made of dark metal with a slightly reflective surface, featuring subtle camouflage-like patches. The carriage is constructed from dark wood, reinforced with metal brackets and bolts, and has two large, solid wheels on each side for mobility. The rear of the cannon includes a rounded knob, typical of historical artillery, and the front end is open, indicating the muzzle. The overall construction is robust, with visible fasteners and a utilitarian design, suggesting it was built for durability and heavy use. The object has a historical, military appearance, reminiscent of cannons used in fortifications or naval warfare.
description: A large, antique-style cannon with a long metal barrel mounted on a sturdy wooden carriage with four wheels. The object features dark, camouflaged metal and reinforced wood construction.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open muzzle of the cannon and the symmetrical arrangement of the wheels and carriage.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length of the barrel, the wooden carriage, and the large wheels.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the rounded knob at the back of the barrel and the structure of the carriage.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the length of the barrel and carriage details.
